# Product Agent v0.1.4 Local Beta

This patch simplifies the first-run language even further.

## Changes

- Removed visible README/PDF/GitHub format guidance from the home screen.
- Removed the separate GitHub URL input from the first screen.
- Changed the primary upload action to `上传产品介绍`.
- Simplified the first message to focus only on sending a product introduction.
- Updated the README screenshot and top description.

## Verify

```bash
pnpm typecheck
node scripts/local-doctor.mjs --json
pnpm build
```
